channel.title: oblachek on Bluesky
channel.description:
Iz ptičjega gnezda me je prineslo na modro nebo, kjer spuščam misli med virtualne oblačke. | Once an enthusiastic bird from Twitter’s nest, now a tiny cloud floating across the blue sky.
📍 Slovenija | Slovenia 🇸🇮🇪🇺🏴‍☠️🏳️‍🌈 🔗 oblachek.eu 📡 RSS: urlr.me/EP4yxq

item.title: [Reply] (S študentske perspektive: ta dokumentacija bi morala biti obvezno branje za vse, na vs...
item.description:
Reply
(S študentske perspektive: ta dokumentacija bi morala biti obvezno branje za vse, na vseh programih!)
View post on Bluesky

item.title: [Reply] Šele pol ure prebiram tole, pa imam že nešteto vprašanj. Ajme, da mi je dano sestavljat...
item.description:
Reply
Šele pol ure prebiram tole, pa imam že nešteto vprašanj. Ajme, da mi je dano sestavljati skupino strokovnjakov in dobiti … nekatere VZ in ŠP. (Čeprav je, po drugi strani, razočaranje verjetno neizogibno.)
www.uradni-list.si/glasilo-urad...
View post on Bluesky

item.title: [Reply] Slučajno veste, kako podrobno se moramo študenti še pred oddajo prijave seznaniti z dok...
item.description:
Reply
Slučajno veste, kako podrobno se moramo študenti še pred oddajo prijave seznaniti z dokumentacijo? Na prijavi je treba samo obkljukati, da "poznavamo" slovensko visoko šolstvo (verjetno ZViS itd.), merila za akreditacijo itd. ter smernice ESG. (Ampak "poznavanje" je zelo širok pojem.)
View post on Bluesky

item.title: Ajme, Jesenice so pa eno samo gradbišče.
item.description:
Ajme, Jesenice so pa eno samo gradbišče.
View post on Bluesky

item.title: [Reply] I know and fully support Blacksky, I think it's great that parallel networks are being ...
item.description:
Reply
I know and fully support Blacksky, I think it's great that parallel networks are being created and widely spread! Even the people behind ATProto/Bluesky have expressed the wish for a more decentralised ecosystem with more alternatives to Bluesky.
View post on Bluesky

item.title: [Reply] I wasn't saying DMs are public. I was answering your question; I'd have been fine with ...
item.description:
Reply
I wasn't saying DMs are public. I was answering your question; I'd have been fine with a public-first model where "direct" didn't automatically mean "private", if that had been clear from the start. Also, DMs weren't even there from the beginning.
View post on Bluesky

item.title: [Reply] That's a fair point, thank you. However, I still don't think it's the same. The so-call...
item.description:
Reply
That's a fair point, thank you.
However, I still don't think it's the same. The so-called "AI features" are an added layer while private accounts would change the visibility and connectedness of the network itself.
View post on Bluesky

item.title: [Reply] Ja, saj se res ne sekiram. Pa še Jay mi je vščkala tisto zloglasno objavo, hehe.
item.description:
Reply
Ja, saj se res ne sekiram. Pa še Jay mi je vščkala tisto zloglasno objavo, hehe.
View post on Bluesky

item.title: [Reply] Na to se je navezovalo, ja. :D Eh, čisto nič me ne gane, interakcije s takšnimi si tako...
item.description:
Reply
Na to se je navezovalo, ja. :D
Eh, čisto nič me ne gane, interakcije s takšnimi si tako ali tako ne želim. Samo rahlo bizarno se mi zdi, kako brezglavo blokirajo profil tega orodja (?!) in nasploh niti poskusijo ne razumeti, kje se nahajajo.
View post on Bluesky

item.title: [Reply] V nevarnih vodah se giblješ; pazi, da te ne začnejo na veliko blokirati množice brez na...
item.description:
Reply
V nevarnih vodah se giblješ; pazi, da te ne začnejo na veliko blokirati množice brez najmanjšega pojma o delovanju Blueskyja!
View post on Bluesky

item.title: [Reply] +1. In vsakič zgroženo zavijam z očmi, ko kje slišim, da "saj se navadiš" in "naravno je".
item.description:
Reply
+1. In vsakič zgroženo zavijam z očmi, ko kje slišim, da "saj se navadiš" in "naravno je".
View post on Bluesky

item.title: [Reply] Actually, if that had been known from the beginning, I'd agree without a problem, becau...
item.description:
Reply
Actually, if that had been known from the beginning, I'd agree without a problem, because I don't use Bsky for sensitive communication.
Also this from 2023: "Bluesky is a public social network. Think of your posts as blog posts – anyone on the web can see them […]
(bsky.social/about/blog/5...)
View post on Bluesky

item.title: [Reply] Hi, I just hope you don't get too enthusiastic about this. Some private/permissioned da...
item.description:
Reply
Hi, I just hope you don't get too enthusiastic about this. Some private/permissioned data, fine, but standard locked profiles would mean drifting away away from the core idea of a public, connected, interoperable network.
View post on Bluesky

item.title: [Reply] Vaflji 2.0, tokrat brez vafljev.
item.description:
Reply
Vaflji 2.0, tokrat brez vafljev.
View post on Bluesky

item.title: [Reply] From what I got, private profiles as known from, for example, Twitter are pretty much a...
item.description:
Reply
From what I got, private profiles as known from, for example, Twitter are pretty much against the original idea of this network. And the infrastructure would need major changes to support them in that form.
View post on Bluesky

item.title: Objaviš komentar, da privatni računi tukaj res niso potrebni, in nemudoma te blokira gr...
item.description:
Objaviš komentar, da privatni računi tukaj res niso potrebni, in nemudoma te blokira gruča snežinkic. Ajme, vrtec. :D
View post on Bluesky

item.title: [Reply] Okay, fair, the ambiguity got me there. :D
item.description:
Reply
Okay, fair, the ambiguity got me there. :D
View post on Bluesky

item.title: [Reply] Wanted doesn't equal needed. If they were essential, they would have been here from the...
item.description:
Reply
Wanted doesn't equal needed. If they were essential, they would have been here from the start.
View post on Bluesky

item.title: [Reply] Bluesky/ATProto started with open, decentralised public conversation as the core idea. ...
item.description:
Reply
Bluesky/ATProto started with open, decentralised public conversation as the core idea. Private/group-private content came later as separate roadmap work. In my opinion, that openness is what makes public networks valuable; connected, discoverable, interoperable, and easier to build on.
View post on Bluesky

item.title: [Reply] "Unpopular" isn’t the same as "meaningless". This is an open protocol, not a closed gar...
item.description:
Reply
"Unpopular" isn’t the same as "meaningless". This is an open protocol, not a closed garden. Public data is part of the deal, and it should stay that way.
View post on Bluesky
